name: average_salary_by_department
description: Calculate the average salary for each department from employee records.

params.description: Calculate the average salary for each department from employee records.

rows.description: List of employee records, each with name, department, age, salary, city, and years_experience

columns.description: List of column names present in the data

average_salary_by_department.description: Dictionary mapping department names to their average salary

summary.description: Summary statistics including total departments and overall average salary

steps: Extract rows and columns from input arguments
Group employee salaries by their department
Calculate the average salary for each department
Compute overall average salary across all departments
Return department averages and summary statistics
